category_title: At-risk high school students in online credit recovery with prior self-discipline and engagement challenges
minimal_context: The student is logged into NovaNET online courseware in a school lab during a summer session, attempting to complete a reading-intensive assignment.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Please log into the NovaNET online courseware and begin today's reading assignment.

STUDENT: I can't do this, there is too much reading demanded of us.

TUTOR: Just do your best to read through the text.

STUDENT: I didn’t do the homework. I didn’t study for test.

TUTOR: You need to pay attention to the screen and finish the work.

STUDENT: I'm done with this. (Stops paying attention, turns away from the computer in the school lab, and starts 'playing around' and being distracted by friends)

options.A: Selects assignments for the student that require drawing or photo editing during the online courseware sessions in the lab.
options.B: Creates a reading community in the school lab founded on respect for choice and individual perspectives regarding the courseware.
options.C: Creates personalized stories for the student to read during the reading-intensive online courseware sessions in the school lab.
options.D: Closely monitors the student's performance to let them know how they can be successful, and helps them set goals to pace themselves through the courseware.
